programme.title: Japanese F1 GP Highlights 2018
programme.desc: The 2018 Japanese Grand Prix from the world-famous Suzuka Circuit. Lewis Hamilton starts on pole as he looks to extend his lead in the title race.

programme.title: Japanese F1 GP Highlights 2019
programme.desc: The 2019 Japanese Grand Prix from the famous Suzuka Circuit. Lewis Hamilton won from pole here last year to take his fifth victory at the race.

programme.title: Japanese F1 GP Highlights 2022
programme.desc: It's all on the line in Suzuka as Max Verstappen has the chance to grab his second world championship in Japan. Can the Dutchman do it from pole or will his rivals have a say? (09.

programme.title: Indycar Highlights
programme.desc: It's IndyCar race day as the field line-up for the season-opening Grand Prix of St Petersburg. Team Penske's Scott McLaughlin takes to the front after earning his 12th career pole. (01.

programme.title: Indycar Highlights
programme.desc: It's NTT IndyCar Series race day as the Grand Prix of Arlington gets underway. In what is his 117th IndyCar event, Sweden's Marcus Ericsson lines up at the front for the first time. (15.

programme.desc: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage from the fifth and final T20 in the series from Hagley Oval in Christchurch. This is only the third T20 series between the two countries and the first since October 2023. The visitors have never won a series against New Zealand in this format and lost their only T20 multi-game contest in the country back in early 2020. South Africa faced the Kiwi's in five matches with the hosts eventually winning 3-1.

programme.desc: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage from the fifth and final T20 in the series from Hagley Oval in Christchurch. The visitors will be looking to end the series on a high and gain revenge after a hammering by the Kiwi's in the semi-finals of the T20 World Cup at the start of the month. Finn Allen hit a record-breaking 33-ball hundred to lead New Zealand to a nine-wicket victory and their second T20 final inside five years.
